chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-203 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No. 148/ 2024. 3. For order on M.A No. 149/ 2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.01.2026 Mr. D.K.Malhi advocate for the applicants. = Through the impugned Judgment and Decree, the matter was remanded to the learned trial Court. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicants, under instructions, state that he would be satisfied if direction may be issued to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial within a stipulate time. Accordingly, the impugned judgment dated 08-01-2024 and decree dated 10-01-2024 passed in Civil Appeal No. 30/ 2023 by the learned District Judge, Mirpurkhas, is upheld; however, the learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of 60 days from receipt of this Order. It is also observed that no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to either party except in extra ordinary circumstances. The instant Revision Application alongwith pending applications is disposed of in above terms with no order as to costs. JUDGE 2 “Saleem”
